title: Operative Contract
description: Schema for YAML operative front matter in daee-epistemics skill files. Validates static per-file metadata; does not govern runtime routing or substitute for the diagnostic IR.

id.description: Module id — must match module-catalogue.json entry when catalogue_registered is true. Uses the code from module-codes.md (e.g., M9-predication-mode, P7-restoration-stops, do-attribute-precision).

module_class.description: Module class. 'governance' is used for framework, pipeline, rubric, and meta files not dispatched as modules; they are not registered in module-catalogue.json.

canonical_path.description: Repo-root-relative path to this file. Must begin with 'skill/'. Linter checks that this equals the actual file path.

contract_version.description: Semver-style version string of the repo version when this contract was written or last updated (e.g., '0.2.0.0').

load_when.description: Trigger conditions for loading this module. Machine-readable version of the blockquote '> use when:' field. Each item is a short prose condition.

routing_effects.description: Effects on routing gate or dispatch order when this module is active. Uses repo routing vocabulary (e.g., 'semantic-discipline-required', 'holds doctrinal-release pending predication clearance').

emits.description: IR or output fields this module is capable of populating. Should correspond to known IR fields (e.g., ontological_disorder, what_is_withheld_and_why, p7_stops_active, routing_gate). Not a guarantee of activation in any given pass.

blocks.description: Moves or dispatch paths this module prohibits. Must not contradict the file's own prose routing rules.

companions.description: Module ids that must or should be loaded alongside this one. Each entry must be a valid id in module-catalogue.json.

output_shapes.description: Output shape(s) this module can produce. bounded-single-pass: one bounded response; held-pending-upstream: output held until upstream blocker clears; recursive-traversal-permitted: governs or licenses same-response recursion; pass-through: conditions other modules without directly producing visible output.

p7_stops_governed.description: P7 stops declared or governed by this file. Only declare stops this file owns or enforces. P7-restoration-stops.md governs all five. Other files declare only the stops they trigger or enforce.

layer_constraint.description: Layer A / Layer B deployment constraint. layer-a-only: output stays in Layer A diagnostic only; layer-b-permitted: output may be deployed in Layer B when register permits; layer-b-governed: this module explicitly governs whether Layer B deployment is permitted or blocked in the current pass.

catalogue_registered.description: Whether this file has a matching entry in module-catalogue.json. Default behavior: true for tactic, procedure, technique, diagnostic, case-library; false for governance. Governance files must set this to false explicitly.
